etimesMosquitoes at home? 6 natural ways to keep them away without chemicalsMosquitoes can be kept away without relying on chemical-heavy solutions by making your surroundings less inviting. Natural methods focus on reducing their attraction to cues like body heat and scents, and creating barriers. A layered, consistent approach, starting with removing stagnant water and using natural repellents, offers a comfortable living space.

etimesWorkers dug a ditch, found ancient Gold: This reclining Buddha statue hid 1300-year-old Gold treasuresConstruction workers in Thailand unearthed a 1,300-year-old treasure trove of gold, silver, and bronze artifacts near a massive reclining Buddha. The discovery, including rings, earrings, and hammered metal sheets depicting Buddha, dates back to the Dvaravati period. These ancient devotional offerings offer a glimpse into historical artistry and faith.

etimesAnangpur Bandh: The incredible story of India’s 1,100-year-old ‘smart dam’ at the edge of the AravallisAnangpur Dam, a 1000-year-old marvel in Delhi's backyard, reveals ancient Indian water wisdom. Built by the Tomar Dynasty, this gravity-fed structure harnessed monsoon rains for irrigation and groundwater recharge. It stands as a testament to sustainable engineering without modern technology. Rediscovering such systems offers solutions to Delhi's current water scarcity.
